---
title: "Installation Git-Bash"
author: "Wolfgang Höfer"
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      left: 2cm
---


# Bilderstrecke Git-Installation

```{typst}
columns(2) [
  figure(image("git_install_001.png", width: 6cm), caption: "Ja wählen")
  figure(image("git_install_002.png", width: 6cm), caption: "Ja wählen")
  # ... restliche Bilder
]
